commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Telegram group and mirrored-group text delivery through Bot API `sendMessage`, preserves rich-message sends for direct chats, downgrades group `web_app` buttons to URL buttons, and adds focused Telegram delivery tests.

PR surface: Source +202, Tests +277. Total +479 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: Partly. Current main clearly routes Telegram text replies through `sendRichMessage`, and the PR body gives production-log root-cause evidence, but I did not reproduce the unsupported-card rendering in a live Telegram group.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer-labeled Telegram transport PR needs live proof and maintainer merge judgment; I found no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(telegram): avoid rich messages in group chats
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes a Telegram group-chat regression where bot replies could render in Telegram Desktop/macOS as an unsupported-message card instead of normal text.

The regression came from the rich-message send path being used for Telegram group replies. Production evidence showed an inbound group conversation followed by an outbound `sendRichMessage` reply on a positive mirrored chat id, so the delivery path treated the reply like a direct chat even though the source conversation was a group.

This PR keeps rich text for direct chats, but treats group and mirrored-group replies as group sends:

- route Telegram group text through Bot API `sendMessage` with HTML/plain fallback instead of `sendRichMessage`
- propagate group/direct chat type through reply delivery instead of inferring solely from signed chat id
- downgrade `web_app` inline buttons to normal URL buttons for group chats, including edit/reply-markup paths
- chunk group replies using Telegram `sendMessage`'s 4096-character limit while retaining rich-message chunking for direct chats

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/send.test.ts`
  - 2 files passed, 189 tests passed
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.send.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.replies.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/send.ts extensions/telegram/src/send.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/inline-keyboard.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Crabbox isolated proof:
  - provider: `local-container`
  - lease: `cbx_57c16786cca4`
  - command: `corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/send.test.ts`
  - result: 2 files passed, 189 tests passed, lease released
- `autoreview --mode local --thinking low --stream-engine-output`
  - no actionable findings, patch correct

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Telegram group replies no longer use `sendRichMessage`, which caused Telegram Desktop/macOS group chats to show an unsupported-message card.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout plus Crabbox `local-container` Linux Node 24 isolated run. Production logs from openclaw2 were used for root-cause evidence.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/send.test.ts`; Crabbox `local-container` run with `corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot/delivery.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/send.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: Regression tests assert group and mirrored-group replies do not call `sendRichMessage`, do call `sendMessage`, convert `web_app` buttons to URL buttons, and split mirrored group replies at the Bot API send-message limit.

Observed result after fix: The focused Telegram send/delivery suite passed locally and in Crabbox with 189 tests passing.

What was not tested: A real Telegram Desktop visual E2E recording was not run in this environment; the available Telegram real-user Crabbox runner was not installed locally, and remote Testbox/AWS Crabbox paths were blocked by missing authentication/credentials.
